company.raw_notes: The homepage at natanitsolutions.com is an unconfigured, out-of-the-box WordPress installation. The only text present is the default WordPress sample post ('Hello world! / Welcome to WordPress. This is your first post. Edit or delete it, then start writing!') and Lorem Ipsum-style filler text. There is zero first-party content describing what 'Natan IT Solutions' actually does, who their clients are, their geography, their team, or their offering. No About page, no Services page, no Contact details beyond the signup email (hr@natanitsolutions.com) are available. Web searches for 'Natan IT Solutions' and 'natanitsolutions.com' returned no matching results — only unrelated companies with similar-sounding names (NAT IT Solutions at natitsolutions.com, NAT IT Solutions at natitsolution.com, NAN IT Solutions, A-NAT Solutions, etc.). None of these are the same entity as natanitsolutions.com.
